title: An effectivization of the global reconstruction in the Gel'fand-Calderon   inverse problem in three dimensions
summary:
By developing the d-bar approach to global "inverse scattering" at zero
energy we give a principal effectivization of the global reconstruction method
for the Gel'fand-Calderon inverse boundary value problem in three dimensions.
This work goes back to results published by the author in 1987, 1988 and
proceeds from recent progress in the d-bar approach to inverse scattering in 3D
published by the author in 2005, 2006.

title: Existence and Exponential mixing of infinite white $\alpha$-stable   Systems with unbounded interactions
summary:
We study an infinite white $\alpha$-stable systems with unbounded
interactions, proving the existence by Galerkin approximation and exponential
mixing property by an $\alpha$-stable version of gradient bounds.
